keyboard_issues.description: No skip-navigation link found. Keyboard users must tab through all navigation items to reach main content.
keyboard_issues.recommendation: Add a visually-hidden skip link at the top of the page: Skip to main content

keyboard_issues.description: Only 3/12 interactive elements are reachable via Tab key. 9 elements may be keyboard-inaccessible.
keyboard_issues.recommendation: Ensure all interactive elements are focusable. Use native HTML elements (button, a) or add tabindex='0' and keyboard event handlers.

screen_reader_issues.description: No <h1> heading found. Screen readers rely on headings to convey page structure.
screen_reader_issues.recommendation: Add a single <h1> element describing the main page purpose.

screen_reader_issues.description: No <nav> landmark found. Navigation regions should be identified for assistive technology.
screen_reader_issues.recommendation: Wrap navigation links in a <nav> element with aria-label if multiple navs exist.

screen_reader_issues.description: 6 form input(s) have no associated label.
screen_reader_issues.recommendation: Associate each input with a <label for='id'> or use aria-label.

functional_issues.description: Page uses animations but does not respect prefers-reduced-motion media query.
functional_issues.recommendation: Add @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { * { animation: none !important; transition: none !important; } }

functional_issues.description: Page does not declare a language. Screen readers need lang attribute to determine pronunciation.
Viewport meta tag disables user zooming. Users with low vision cannot enlarge content.
functional_issues.recommendation: Remove maximum-scale=1 and user-scalable=no from viewport meta tag.
